envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Envelopes are DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED. Real activation requires admin to walk D4 reviews + the future D6 Activation slice. This substrate is the canonical projection a future D6 will consume.

starter_envelope.name: Starter / Pilot Starter Envelope
starter_envelope.description: Bundles the conservatively-scoped subset of D4-approved Map regions appropriate for a Starter / Pilot plan tier. Designed for pilot teams + evaluation deployments with $250 base + 1 admin + 2 standard twin seats per the B2 catalog. Baseline DMW + safety + audit included; no connector pack entitlement at this tier so connector-bound regions are deliberately excluded from this envelope.
starter_envelope.human_readable_summary: Smallest viable Starter / Pilot envelope: Company + Org + Role + Memory baselines + safe-fallback aha moments. No connector activation. No workflow runtime. Conservative defaults at every region.
starter_envelope.model_usage_notes: Use this envelope for the cheapest plan tier. The bundle deliberately excludes connector + workflow-runtime regions because the Starter / Pilot ledger (B4) does not include those capability pack entitlements. The envelope encodes 'safe by minimum scope' rather than 'safe by extensive guards'.

OrgRelationshipMap.human_summary: Approval chains only; escalation paths deferred

RoleMap.human_summary: Template match + safe day-one capabilities for admin + standard twin roles only

ToolMap.human_summary: Forbidden-tool exclusion only; no connector activation at this tier

WorkflowMap.human_summary: Stage 1 templates + safe-fallback paths; no Stage 2+ at this tier

AuthorityMap.human_summary: 'Must never be assumed' surfaces only; no delegated authority profiles at this tier

MemoryDmwMap.human_summary: Baseline DMW safety + self-scoped memory; team/customer scopes deferred

RiskMap.human_summary: Map-blocking risks + RULE-20 forbidden inferences + unknown-area conservatism

AhaMomentMap.human_summary: Safe-fallback aha moments only (no connector required)

approved_regions_bundle.rationale_summary: Approve only the pilot-department approval chain.
Wave 2.1 DEEP roles only (e.g. EA + Admin).

cross_map_dependency_resolution: Company Map approval (region: initial-departments + sensitive-systems-exclusion) gates every downstream Map activation
Org Map approval-chains gate Authority Map approval downstream
Risk Map map-blocking + RULE-20-forbidden gate Tool / Workflow / Memory Map activation
Authority Map 'must never be assumed' inherited by every downstream Twin scope
Memory / DMW Map baseline + self-scope inherited regardless of plan tier

DMW_scope_ceiling.derivation_note: Starter / Pilot envelope derives DMW scope ceiling from Memory Map baseline + self-scoped approvals only. No team / project / customer scope at this tier. Forbidden categories absolute regardless of admin choice (RULE-20 protected).

audit_expectations: ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_REFERENCED when consumed by a future D6 activation
future ADMIN_ACTION:STARTER_ENVELOPE_ACTIVATED at D6 with envelope_id + plan_archetype_id
no new audit literal at D5
governance_review_points: Envelope is DRAFT_NOT_ACTIVATED — real activation at D6 requires admin to walk D4 reviews + admin policy approval
Starter / Pilot envelope deliberately excludes connector + Stage 2+ workflow regions
DMW baseline always-on regardless of envelope tier per ADR-0083
Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe
safe_defaults: No connector activation at this tier
forbidden_defaults: Stage 2+ workflow inclusion at Starter / Pilot
Connector pack activation at this tier
